prompt: Generate a realistic scene with the astronomer on the moon, in the position from the reference image, standing near their spaceship with a starry sky and Earth in the background.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic scene depicting an astronomer in a space suit, floating above the desolate lunar surface. The astronomer's body is positioned precisely as depicted in image 1, with their helmeted head oriented towards the upper-right side of the frame and their body extending diagonally downwards towards the lower-left. They are situated in close proximity to their spaceship. In the deep background, a vast, star-filled sky is visible, with the Earth prominently displayed.
objects: astronomer in a space suit, floating
astronomer's body positioned diagonally downwards towards the lower-left
astronomer's helmeted head oriented towards the upper-right side of the frame
spaceship in close proximity to the astronomer
vast, star-filled sky in the deep background
Earth prominently displayed in the deep background
